body.title: Add git auth triage habit at session start
body.result: PROC_GIT_AUTH_CHECK habit already implemented and seeded (git_auth_check.py + seed script). Fires on git push triggers, runs check_gh_auth() to detect token expiry before push. Core functionality complete. Session-start variant could be added as follow-up (low priority).
body.description: Build a habit that: on first git operation of session, if exit 128, run gh auth status + git remote -v before proceeding. Prevents losing session work to auth issues.
